zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield於1189年出生在英國越可爾哈特菲爾德時，他的父親William fitz Simon of Hatfield29歲，母親Agnes de Kyme30歲。他於大約1219年與Saint John在英國英格蘭賀特福爾哈特菲爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1238年5月在英國賀特福爾哈特菲爾德享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield于1189年出生在英国越可爾哈特菲爾德时，他的父亲William fitz Simon of Hatfield29岁，母亲Agnes de Kyme30岁。他于大约1219年与Saint John在英国英格兰賀特福爾哈特菲爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1238年5月在英国賀特福爾哈特菲爾德享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzwilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield was born in 1189, in Hatfield, Yorkshire, England, his father, William fitz Simon of Hatfield, was 29 and his mother, Agnes de Kyme, was 30. He married Saint John about 1219, in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in May 1238, in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield est né en 1189, à Hatfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William fitz Simon of Hatfield, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Kyme, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Saint John environ 1219, à Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1238, à Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield 1189 in Hatfield, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William fitz Simon of Hatfield 29 und seine Mutter Agnes de Kyme 30. Er hat um 1219 in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Saint John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1238 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield è nato il nel 1189 nel Hatfield, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William fitz Simon of Hatfield, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Kyme, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Saint John circa 1219, nel Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1238, nel Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfieldが1189年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハトフィールドで生まれた時，父William fitz Simon of Hatfieldは29歳，母Agnes de Kymeは30歳であった。約1219年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハトフィールドでSaint Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1238年5月にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハトフィールドで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield(이)가 1189년 영국 요르크실르 하트필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William fitz Simon of Hatfield(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Kyme(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 하트필드에서 Saint John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1238년 5월 영국 허트퍼드실르 하트필드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield nasceu em 1189, em Hatfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William fitz Simon of Hatfield, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Kyme, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Saint John aproximadamente 1219, em Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1238, em Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield родился в 1189 г. в местности хатфиелд, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William fitz Simon of Hatfield было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Kyme, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Saint John около 1219 г. в местности хатфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер май 1238 г. в местности хатфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Fitzwilliam of Hatfield nació en 1189, en Hatfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William fitz Simon of Hatfield, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes de Kyme, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Saint John aproximadamente 1219, en Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1238, en Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
